route.name: Frog Lake Loop
route.region: Mount Hood National Forest / Frog Lake / Timothy Lake
route.description: Official/public GPX two-day Mount Hood loop with forest roads, singletrack, lakeside connectors, and short highway-adjacent bailout options.
route.surfaceMix: Official/public GPX two-day Mount Hood loop with forest roads, singletrack, lakeside connectors, and short highway-adjacent bailout options.
route.bestSeason: Late May through September; July 10-13 needs Mt. Hood fire restriction, smoke, and campground refresh.

difficultyProfile.surface: Official/public GPX two-day Mount Hood loop with forest roads, singletrack, lakeside connectors, and short highway-adjacent bailout options.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Frog Lake, Clear Lake, and Timothy Lake water sources during the open season; filter and start full.
resources.food: No food resupply on route; carry two days of food.
resources.camping: Timothy Lake campgrounds, Meditation Point first-come hiker camp, dispersed camping on NF-4280, and Frog Lake reservable fallback.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before ride-ready promotion.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Use propane/liquid-fuel stove only during 2026 fire restrictions.
Carry all food and a water filter.
Re-check Mt. Hood alerts immediately before travel.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control ride-ready promotion.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

blockers: Not ride-ready until date-specific camp/permit, water, legal access, closures, fire/smoke, and weather are refreshed.
requiredFixes: Complete July 9-10 final refresh for next-weekend ride readiness.
openQuestions: Do current closures/fire/weather alter the imported GPX?

promotionChecklist.targetWindowNote: Strong July fallback: short Mt. Hood loop with direct GPX, cool forecast profile, non-reservation overnight path, and known fire restrictions.
promotionChecklist.officialGeometryNote: Official/public GPX has been imported and parsed locally.

days.name: Frog Lake Loop segment 1
days.camp: Timothy Lake campgrounds, Meditation Point first-come hiker camp, dispersed camping on NF-4280, and Frog Lake reservable fallback.

waypoints.name: Gravel road with Road Closed sign
Walk your Bike until Timothy Trail
